title: centaurea × basilei
intro: Centaurea × basilei, also known as Centaurea basilei or Mountain Centaury, is a hybrid flowering plant that combines the characteristics of Centaurea montana and Centaurea solstitialis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea × basilei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Centaurea × basilei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in the production of herbal remedies and cosmetics.
